bird.name: 三聲夜鷹
bird.summary: 三聲夜鷹（學名：Antrostomus vociferus），是一種分布於北美的夜鷹。棲息於開闊的林地。波多黎各夜鷹亦稱為波多黎各三聲夜鷹。

relations.subject: 三聲夜鷹
relations.evidence: thumb|left|A rarely seen eastern whip-poor-will by day in Philadelphia, [[Pennsylvania]] The eastern whip-poor-will is currently in decline, though they remain fairly common. In 2017, the eastern whip-poor-will was uplisted from least concern to near threatened on the IUCN Red List on the basis of citizen science observations demonstrating a decline in populations of the eastern whip-poor-will by over 60% between 1970 and 2014. Several reasons for the decline are proposed, such as loss of early successional forest habitat related to fire suppression and habitat destruction, predation by feral cats and dogs, and poisoning by insecticides, but the actual causes remain elusive. Pesticides and intensified agriculture have led to declines in the flying insect populations that the eastern whip-poor-will depends on
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

In 2017, the eastern whip-poor-will was uplisted from least concern to near threatened on the IUCN Red List on the basis of citizen science observations demonstrating a decline in populations of the eastern whip-poor-will by over 60% between 1970 and 2014. Several reasons for the decline are proposed, such as loss of early successional forest habitat related to fire suppression and habitat destruction, predation by feral cats and dogs, and poisoning by insecticides, but the actual causes remain elusive. Pesticides and intensified agriculture have led to declines in the flying insect populations that the eastern whip-poor-will depends on
relations.object_summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。
